summary: Error Handling (Production Readiness Item #4) Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - ErrorBoundary integrated, app loads correctly for coach role. All error responses follow structured {error: {code, message, request_id}} envelope, X-Request-ID header present on all responses, success responses unchanged, no stack traces exposed.
critical_code_review_comments: RequestIDMiddleware correctly attaches unique request ID to every request/response via X-Request-ID header

All exception handlers (http_exception_handler, global_exception_handler, starlette_http_exception_handler, validation_exception_handler) return structured {error: {code, message, request_id}} envelope
Validation errors include 'details' array with field-level error information
No stack traces exposed in error responses - only user-friendly messages
Success responses (login, mission-control, athletes) NOT wrapped in error envelope - format unchanged
ErrorBoundary component properly wraps entire app in App.js with retry/reload functionality
apiError.js utility provides parseApiError() and getErrorMessage() for frontend error handling
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Error Handling testing complete (iteration 241). All 23 backend tests passed verifying: (1) X-Request-ID header present on ALL responses (success and error), (2) Structured error responses with {error: {code, message, request_id}} envelope, (3) Validation errors include 'details' array, (4) Error codes correctly mapped (401->UNAUTHORIZED, 404->NOT_FOUND, 422->VALIDATION_ERROR), (5) No stack traces exposed, (6) Success responses unchanged (login returns {token, user}, mission-control returns role data, athletes returns list), (7) Custom X-Request-ID in request is preserved in response. Frontend verified: ErrorBoundary component wraps app in App.js, app loads correctly without showing fallback UI, coach login and dashboard work correctly.

middleware/error_handling.py.RequestIDMiddleware: Correctly attaches unique request ID to every request/response
middleware/error_handling.py.http_exception_handler: Handles FastAPI HTTPException with structured response
middleware/error_handling.py.global_exception_handler: Catches unhandled exceptions, logs traceback, returns safe JSON
middleware/error_handling.py.starlette_http_exception_handler: Handles Starlette HTTP exceptions (e.g., 404 from router)
middleware/error_handling.py.validation_exception_handler: Handles Pydantic validation errors with details array
